task_completion.description: Open the VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard and select the correct volume type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard open, with 'Create an encrypted file container' and/or 'Standard VeraCrypt volume' selected.
The Volume Location screen in the wizard should show the file path '/home/ga/Volumes/secret_archive.hc' entered in the input field.

task_completion.description: Set the correct encryption and hash algorithms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Encryption Options screen should show 'AES' selected in the Encryption Algorithm dropdown and 'SHA-512' selected in the Hash Algorithm dropdown.
The Volume Size screen should show '50' entered in the size field with 'MB' (Megabytes) selected.
The Volume Password screen should be visible with characters (masked or unmasked) entered into the Password and Confirm fields.

task_completion.description: Format the volume with the FAT filesystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Volume Format screen should show 'FAT' selected as the Filesystem, followed by the agent clicking 'Format', or a final success message stating the volume has been successfully created.

integrity.description: The agent must use the VeraCrypt graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual VeraCrypt GUI windows being interacted with, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use CLI commands to bypass the GUI requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'veracrypt -t -c' or 'veracrypt --create' being used to generate the container.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely progressed through the wizard steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots should show sequential progression through the different screens of the Volume Creation Wizard.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a VeraCrypt container strictly via the GUI with the following exact parameters: Path: '/home/ga/Volumes/secret_archive.hc', Size: 50MB, Password: 'SecurePass2024', Encryption: AES, Hash: SHA-512, Filesystem: FAT.
